roṣarūkṣeṇa niṭilākṣeṇa bhasmīkṛtacetane makaraketane tadā bhayenānavadyā vaniteti matvā tasya rolambāvalī keśajālam premākaro rajanīkaro vijitāravindavadanam jayadhvajāyamāno mīno jāyāyuto 'kṣiyugalam sakalasainikāṅgavīro malayasamīro niḥśvāsaḥ pathikahṛddalanakaravālaḥ pravālaścādhārabimbam jayaśaṅkho bandhurā lāvaṇyadharā kandharā pūrṇakumbhau cakravākānukārau payodharau jyāyamāne mārdavāsamāne bisalate ca bāhū īṣadutphullalīlāvataṃsakahlārakorakau gaṅgāvartasanābhir nābhiḥ dūrīkṛtayogimanoratho jaitraratho 'tighanaṃ jaghanam jayastambhabhūte saundaryabhūte vighnitayatijanārambhe rambhe coruyugam ātapatrasahasrapatraṃ pādadvayam astrabhūtāni prasūnāni tānītarāṇyaṅgāni ca samabhūvanniva
rolambalālitasuradrumasūnakalpitottaṃsam utkacanavotpalakarṇapūram
yaddānatoyataralais tilatulanālambi rolambaiḥ

sarvabhūteṣu dayāluḥ samaḥ kṣāntaḥ śucir nirasūyakaḥ sukhe niḥspṛho maṅgalyavāṇīrṣyākārpaṇyavarjī matsyādīn daṃśakān sīrakṛṣṭajātāni kandamūlaphalaśākādīni ca tyajan jaṭāśmaśruromanakhāni dhārayaṃs trikālasnāyī dharāśayo vanyair eva carupuroḍāśān nirvapet
kṣatriyāyām adhonāpito nābher adho romavaptā
brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā svayaṃ bhuktvā keśaśmaśruromanakhāni vāpayīta śikhāvarjam
likhannāste bhūmiṃ bahiravanataḥ prāṇadayito nirāhārāḥ sakhyaḥ satataruditocchūnanayanāḥ
gīta vādita rudita ativāteṣu tad kālam
ete bahuvidhāḥ śokā vilāparudite tathā
ṣaḍdhāturūpameva puruṣaṃ punaḥ sāṃkhyadarśanabhedāc caturviṃśatikabhedenāha punaścetyādi

yadyapi ca sāṃkhye āhaṃkārikāṇīndriyāṇi yaduktaṃ sāttvika ekādaśakaḥ pravartate vaikṛtād ahaṃkārād iti tathāpi matabhedādbhautikatvam indriyāṇāṃ jñeyaṃ kiṃvā aupacārikam etadbhautikatvam indriyāṇāṃ jñeyam upacārabījaṃ ca yad guṇabhūyiṣṭhaṃ yad indriyaṃ gṛhṇāti tattadbhūyiṣṭham ityucyate cakṣustejo gṛhṇāti tena taijasam ucyate ityādi jñeyam
mokṣam adhyāpayāmāsa sāṃkhyajñānam anuttamam
sākṣibhūtaśca kasyāyam ityasyottaraṃ jña ityādi
jño jñānavān sākṣīti loke kathyate natvajñaḥ pāṣāṇādiḥ
tena jñatvenāsatyapyanyasmin kartari sākṣītyucyate iti vākyārthaḥ
yatra bhīmo mahābāhuḥ sātyakiśca mahārathaḥ
sātyakiśca maheṣvāsaḥ śeṣāśca nidhanaṃ gatāḥ
sātyakiḥ kṛtavarmā ca nārāyaṇam anuvratau
rarāja rājaputrī tu vidyut saudāmanī yathā
kāñcanābhaṃ nabhaścakre vidyutsaudāmanī yathā
sakhīmadhye 'navadyāṅgī vidyut saudāmanī yathā
yena prācyāstu sauvīrā dākṣiṇātyāśca nirjitāḥ
sauvīrān pratipattau ca babhror eṣa yaśasvinaḥ
jayadratho nāma yadi śrutas te sauvīrarājaḥ subhage sa eṣaḥ
suśākaḥ pathyaśākaś ca sphūrjathuḥ svanitāhvayaḥ
na tatra vajrapātasya sphūrjathvāderupadravaḥ
vyādhāmaḥ kuliśo 'syārciratibhīḥ sphūrjathurdhvaniḥ
tvaksphoṭanaṃ ṣṭhīvanagātrasādau mṛdbhakṣaṇaṃ prekṣaṇakūṭaśothaḥ
sphoṭanaṃ punarāvṛttau baddhasūtasya lakṣaṇam

ata ūrdhvaṃ sarvavraṇavedanā vakṣyāmaḥ todanabhedanatāḍanacchedanāyamanamanthanavikṣepaṇacumucumāyananirdahanāvabhañjanasphoṭanavidāraṇotpāṭanakampanavividhaśūlaviśleṣaṇavikiraṇapūraṇastambhanasvapnākuñcanāṅkuśikāḥ sambhavanti animittavividhavedanāprādurbhāvo vā muhurmuhuryatrāgacchanti vedanāviśeṣāstaṃ vātikamiti vidyāt oṣacoṣaparidāhadhūmāyanāni yatra gātram aṅgārāvakīrṇam iva pacyate yatra coṣmābhivṛddhiḥ kṣate kṣārāvasiktavac ca vedanāviśeṣāstaṃ paittikamiti vidyāt pittavadraktasamutthaṃ jānīyāt kaṇḍūrgurutvaṃ suptatvam upadeho 'lpavedanatvaṃ stambhaḥ śaityaṃ ca yatra taṃ ślaiṣmikamiti vidyāt yatra sarvāsāṃ vedanānāmutpattistaṃ sāṃnipātikamiti vidyāt
ūrdhvasthālīṃ samālipya kartavyaṃ sampuṭaṃ varam
adhaḥ sthālīṃ parityajya cordhvasthālyāṃ parivrajet
sthālīsampuṭayantreṇa dinaṃ caṇḍāgninā pacet
tasminnāgatya kaṇṭhagrahaṇasarabhasasthāyini prāṇanāthe bhagnā mānasya cintā bhavati mama punarvajramayyāḥ kadā nu
tasyordhve paramaṃ satyaṃ vyomasthāyi parātparam
śiśire salilasthāyī rātryahāni tapodhanaḥ
saṃ sūribhir maghavant saṃ svastyā sam brahmaṇā devakṛtam yad astīti

prāṇo vai brahma pūrvyam annaṃ namas tat tad eṣaivāhutir annam etayaiva tad āhutyaitenānnena prāṇān etasmai karmaṇe yuṅkte vi śloka etu pathyeva sūreriti yathobhayeṣu devamanuṣyeṣu kīrtiśloko yajamānasya syād evam etad āha śṛṇvantu viśve amṛtasya putrā iti prajāpatirvā amṛtas tasya viśve devāḥ putrā ā ye dhāmāni divyāni tasthur itīme vai lokā divyāni dhāmāni tad ya eṣu lokeṣu devās tān etad āha
sa bodhi sūrir maghavā vasupate vasudāvan yuyodhy asmad dveṣāṃsīti

brāhmaḥ sāvitravratād ūrdhvam anabhiśastāpatitānāṃ gṛhasthānāṃ gṛheṣu bhaikṣācaraṇaṃ vedavratacaraṇaṃ ca kṛtvā dvādaśa samā viṃśatisamā vā gurukule sthitvā vedān vedau vedaṃ vā sūtrasahitam adhyayanaṃ kṛtvā gārhasthyānusaraṇaṃ kuryāt

naiṣṭhikaḥ kāṣāyaṃ dhātuvastram ajinaṃ valkalaṃ vā paridhāya jaṭī śikhī vā mekhalī daṇḍī sūtrājinadhārī brahmacārī śucir akṣāralavaṇāśī yāvad ātmano viprayogas tāvad gurukule sthitvā niveditabhaikṣabhojī bhavati

ato 'nyatamaṃ karma cikīrṣatā vaidyena pūrvam evopakalpayitavyāni yantraśastrakṣārāgniśalākāśṛṅgajalaukālābūjāmbavauṣṭhapicuprotasūtrapattrapaṭṭamadhughṛtavasāpayas tailatarpaṇakaṣāyālepanakalkavyajanaśītoṣṇodakakaṭāhādīni parikarmiṇaś ca snigdhāḥ sthirā balavantaḥ
prakāradvayaṃ saṃdṛṣṭvā pīṭhī gandhakasambhavā
mārgamāṇo vane sītāṃ rākṣasaṃ saṃdadarśa ha
bhṛgutunde samāsīnam ṛcīkaṃ saṃdadarśa ha
saṃgatyā nāparādhnoti rājyam etad anāyakam
saṃgatyā bharataḥ śrīmān rājyenārthī svayaṃ bhavet

yatpunardvitīyasya pratisaṃskartṛsūtratayā bhūtānadyatanaparokṣe liḍvidhir upapādyate tatra vicāryaṃ kim idaṃ dvitīyaṃ sūtraṃ pūrvavākyaikatāpannaṃ na vā yadyekavākyatāpannaṃ tadā suśrute tathā vyākhyāsyāmo yathovāca dhanvantarir iti yojanīyaṃ tathāca tathā vyākhyāsyāma iti kriyaikavākyatāpannam uvācetipadaṃ na bhinnakartṛkaṃ bhavitum arhati tathā ca kuto liḍvidhiḥ atha naikatāpannaṃ tadā gaur aśvaḥ puruṣo hastītivannārthasaṃgatiḥ
pratijagrāha saṃhṛṣṭas tasya tuṣṭo 'bhavad guruḥ
pratyujjagāma saṃhṛṣṭo brahmāṇam iva vāsavaḥ
surāś ca sarve saṃhṛṣṭā viśvāmitram athābruvan
sa jñātvā tasya saṃkalpaṃ brahmaṇaḥ parameśvaraḥ
atha sā śuddhasaṃkalpā kāṅkṣitaprāptasatphalā
apāpaḥ pāpasaṃkalpāṃ dadarśa dharaṇītale
saṃnikarṣāc ca sauhārdaṃ jāyate sthāvareṣv api
saṃnikarṣe tu naḥ śūra jayaṃ śatroḥ parājayam
apadhvaṃsata gacchadhvaṃ saṃnikarṣād ito mama
ūcuḥ sarve susaṃrabdhā ilāputraṃ mahāmatim
uvācedaṃ susaṃrabdhā vacanaṃ vacanāraṇiḥ
susaṃrabdhaṃ tu saumitriṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ krodhamūrchitam
saṃpratyevaṃrūpapuruṣasya sakāraṇaṃ saṃsaraṇaṃ mokṣahetuṃ cāha raja ityādi
śītodakamātrāmiti gantā tatra nimittāni śītodakamātrāmiti mātrāśabdo'yamalpārthaḥ saṃsaraṇaśīlaḥ
acalitamatir acyutaḥ svadharmāt parimitasaṃsaraṇaḥ parāvarajñaḥ
dūtasyāgamanaṃ caiva saṃvādo 'tha visarjanam
brahmaṇaścaiva saṃvādaṃ purā yajñasya caiva ha
iti śrīpārvatīparameśvarasaṃvāde rasārṇave rasasaṃhitāyām abhrakādilakṣaṇasaṃskāranirṇayo nāma ṣaṣṭhaḥ paṭalaḥ
nityaṃ ca priyavādena tathā saṃvardhanena ca
prayatnād ābālyaṃ navakamalinīpallavakulais tvayā bhūyo yasyāḥ kṛtam ahaha saṃvardhanam abhūt
saṃvardhanapariśrāntāṃ dvitīyāṃ tāṃ ca mātaram
ūrdhvapātraṃ tadardhena mukhaṃ saṃveśamātrakam
saṃveśāyopaveśāya gāyatryai chandase 'bhibhūtaye svāhā saṃveśāyopaveśāya triṣṭubhe chandase 'bhibhūtaye svāhā saṃveśāyopaveśāya jagatyai chandase 'bhibhūtaye svāheti juhoti
nidrā pramīlā śayanaṃ saṃveśasvāpasaṃlayāḥ
na dṛṣṭeḥ śaithilyaṃ milana iti ceto dahati me nigūḍhāntaḥkopāt kaṭhinahṛdaye saṃvṛtiriyam
sphuṭam abhilaṣitaṃ babhūva vadhvā vadati hi saṃvṛtir eva kāmitāni
kathaṃ na vidyate sattvaḥ saṃvṛtyā deśanā katham
diśantu me sukhamatulaṃ sukhapradā balaṃ ca vīryaṃ sthiratāṃ ca saṃyuge
kasya bibhyati devāś ca jātaroṣasya saṃyuge
mānuṣīṃ tanum āsthāya rāvaṇaṃ jahi saṃyuge
tīkṣṇair nirūhair matimān kṣāramūtrāmlasaṃyutaiḥ
kvathitaiḥ pālikair ebhir madanāṣṭakasaṃyutaiḥ
hiṅgulā parinipīḍitā dṛḍhā kanyakaikādaśasaṃyutā tadā
bhāvitaṃ puṭitaṃ ratnaiḥ pūrvavat saphalaṃ bhavet
adya me saphalaṃ janma jīvitaṃ ca sujīvitam
surasāhyakaraṃ sarve saphalaṃ kartum arhatha

nīte ca janākṣilakṣyatāṃ lākṣārasadigdhadhiggajaśiraḥsadṛkṣe śakradigaṅganāratnādarśe 'rkacakre kṛtakaraṇīyaḥ kiraṇajālakarālaratnarājirājitarājārhāsanādhyāsī yathāsadṛśācāradarśinaḥ śaṅkāyantritāṅgānsaṃnidhiniṣādinaḥ sahāyān agāhiṣam dṛśyatāṃ śaktirārṣī yattasya yaterajeyarayendriyāṇāṃ saṃskāreṇa nīrajasā nīrajasāṃnidhyaśālini saharṣālini sarasi sarasijadalasaṃnikāśachāyasyādhikataradarśanīyasyākārāntarasya siddhirāsīt
īdṛśaśca sadṛkṣaśca etādṛkṣo mitāśanaḥ
kacciddhareḥ saumya sutaḥ sadṛkṣa āste 'graṇī rathināṃ sādhu sāmbaḥ
jvaryeta pratatamatho vasāsagandhir niḥsaṃjño bhavati hi naigameṣajuṣṭaḥ
varcomiśraṃ niḥpurīṣaṃ sagandhaṃ nirgandhaṃ vā sāryate tena kṛcchrāt
yā kanyā duhitā tasyā matsyā matsyasagandhinī
iyamoṣadhe trāyamāṇā sahamānā sahasvatī
udapātre 'vadhāya pradakṣiṇaṃ paryāplāvayatīyam oṣadhe trāyamāṇā sahamānā sahasvatī sā mā hiraṇyavarcasaṃ brahmavarcasinaṃ mā karotv ity uddhṛtyākṣṇayaiva paryāhṛtya pratimuñcate 'pāśo 'sīti
anavadyair abhidyubhir makhaḥ sahasvad arcati
sahodaraste dayitaḥ kumāro 'kṣaśca sūditaḥ
saputraṃ vidhamiṣyāmi sahodarayutaṃ yudhi
yuyutsum apanīyaikaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ sahodarāḥ
etadrūpaṃ samākhyātaṃ tṛtīyaṃ cintanātmakam
utthāpanaṃ samākhyātaṃ bodhanaṃ paratastathā
antāvasthā samākhyātā viśrāmas tv adhunocyate
jalaṃ sravenmadhūcchiṣṭaṃ tatsamādāya pārvati
tasya tailaṃ samādāya kumbhe tāmramaye kṣipet
snuhīkṣīraṃ samādāya niṣkārdhaṃ hemaṃ dhmāpayet
priyam abhisarasyevaṃ mugdhe samāhataḍiṇḍimā yadi kimadhikatrāsotkampaṃ diśaḥ samudīkṣase
sā bhūmir bahubhir yānaiḥ khuranemisamāhatā
haste hastaṃ samāhatya cakāra sumahad vapuḥ
manye tasya nirasyamānakiraṇasyaiṣā mukhenodgatā śvāsāmodasamākulālinikaravyājena dhūmāvaliḥ
sthagayati muhuḥ patyurnetre vihasya samākulā surataviratā ramyā tanvī muhurmuhurīkṣate
apaśyan nagaraṃ śrīmān nānājanasamākulam
śrīkaṅkālayayogisamīpāt samāyātam adhyāyaṃ vadāmīti śiṣyavacanam
ahaṃ tenāhūtā kimapi kathayāmīti vijane samīpe cāsīnā sarasahṛdayatvād avahitā
tām sandhivelā samīpam purastāt agneḥ avasthāpya upasthitāyām juhuyāt yat paśavaḥ pra dhyāyata iti
vastramṛttikayā limpet samagramapi kumpakam
bījapūraṃ samagraṃ tu veṣṭayedvastramṛtsnayā

bījapūrasya vṛntam utpāṭya madhye utkīrya randhraṃ kṛtvā tatra hīrakaṃ jātyaṃ kṣiptvopari vṛntenācchādya vastramṛttikayā samagraṃ bījapūrakaṃ veṣṭayitvā tato hastamātraṃ dīrghā hastamātraṃ pṛthulā hastamātraṃ cādha evaṃ gartāṃ kṛtvā sthāpitaiḥ chāṇakaiḥ pūrayitvā tatra bījapūrakaṃ muktvopari mukhe karparaṃ dattvā chāṇakeṣu vahnir deyaḥ
tasyāḥ samparkamātreṇa baddhastiṣṭhati sūtakaḥ
tasyāḥ samparkamātreṇa baddhastiṣṭhati pāradaḥ
niryātanaṃ pātanasaṃjñam uktaṃ vaṅgāhisamparkajakañcukaghnam
nirmukhaṃ samukhaṃ caiva vāsanāmukhameva ca
marditaṃ carate devi seyaṃ samukhajāraṇā
samukhaṃ nirmukhaṃ vāpi yatnataścārayennabhaḥ
atha tīrthaprasaṅgena munibhiḥ samupāgataiḥ
śūram akṣaṃ ca niṣpiṣya grahaṇaṃ samupāgamat
ahaṃ hi niyamād rāma hitvā tāṃ samupāgataḥ
elā trikaṭukaṃ rāsnā saralo devadāru ca
karavīraṃ devadāruṃ saralaṃ rajanīdvayam
candanāguruniryāsān saralaṃ padmakaṃ tathā
sattvavanto balopetā lohe krāmaṇaśīlinaḥ
parikrāntā mahī sarvā sattvavantaś ca sūditāḥ
nimiḥ paramadharmātmā sarvasattvavatāṃ varaḥ
puṇḍrān kirātān dramiḍān siṃhalān barbarāṃstathā
draviḍāḥ siṃhalāścaiva rājā kāśmīrakastathā
śataśaśca kuthāṃstatra siṃhalāḥ samupāharan

sarvabhūteṣu dayāluḥ samaḥ kṣāntaḥ śucir nirasūyakaḥ sukhe niḥspṛho maṅgalyavāṇīrṣyākārpaṇyavarjī matsyādīn daṃśakān sīrakṛṣṭajātāni kandamūlaphalaśākādīni ca tyajan jaṭāśmaśruromanakhāni dhārayaṃs trikālasnāyī dharāśayo vanyair eva carupuroḍāśān nirvapet
nityasnāyī brahmacārī gṛhastho vanago muniḥ
nityasnāyī bhaved dakṣaḥ saṃdhye tu dve japan dvijaḥ

tataḥ praśasteṣu tithikaraṇamuhūrtanakṣatreṣu dadhyakṣatānnapānaratnair agniṃ viprān bhiṣajaś cārcayitvā kṛtabalimaṅgalasvastivācanaṃ laghubhuktavantaṃ prāṅmukham āturam upaveśya yantrayitvā pratyaṅmukho vaidyo marmasirāsnāyusaṃdhyasthidhamanīḥ pariharan anulomaṃ śastraṃ nidadhyād ā pūyadarśanāt sakṛd evāpaharec chastram āśu ca mahatsv api ca pākeṣu dvyaṅgulāntaraṃ tryaṅgulāntaraṃ vā śastrapadamuktam
anyathā tu sirāsnāyucchedanam atimātraṃ vedanā cirād vraṇasaṃroho māṃsakandīprādurbhāvaś ceti

tatrailādinā kuṣṭhatagaravarjyena ślakṣṇapiṣṭena dvādaśāṅgulaṃ śarakāṇḍamaṅgulipariṇāhaṃ kṣaumeṇāṣṭāṅgulaṃ veṣṭayitvā lepayedeṣā vartiḥ prāyogike snehaphalasāramadhūcchiṣṭasarjarasagugguluprabhṛtibhiḥ snehamiśraiḥ snaihike śirovirecanadravyair vairecane bṛhatīkaṇṭakārikātrikaṭukāsamardahiṅgviṅgudītvaṅmanaḥśilācchinnaruhākarkaṭaśṛṅgīprabhṛtibhiḥ kāsaharaiśca kāsaghne snāyucarmakhuraśṛṅgakarkaṭakāsthiśuṣkamatsyavallūrakṛmiprabhṛtibhir vāmanīyaiśca vāmanīye
sopānaṃ kāñcanaṃ citram āruroha tayā saha
śakyam ambaram āruhya meghasopānapaṅktibhiḥ
satyaṃ svargasya sopānaṃ pārāvārasya naur iva
dṛṣṭvā ca spṛhayā devīṃ maithunāyopacakrame
paśya lakṣmaṇa vaidehyāḥ spṛhāṃ mṛgagatām imām
paśya lakṣmaṇa vaidehīṃ mṛgatvaci gataspṛhām
āryāvarapradānaṃ ca śailādistava eva ca
stavenānena tuṣṭo 'smi kiṃ dadāni ca te 'nagha
pārāśarya stavaṃ hīdaṃ śṛṇuyādyaḥ paṭheta vā
sudharmā cāniruddhaśca śrutāyuśca mahābalaḥ
sudharmā cāniruddhaśca śaibyaśca narapuṃgavaḥ
tatra dāśārṇako rājā sudharmā lomaharṣaṇam
utpattiṃ kāraṇaṃ caiva suśrutaikamanāḥ śṛṇu
śiṣyāstaṃ devamāsīnaṃ papracchuḥ suśrutādayaḥ
suśrute ca yathovāca bhagavān dhanvantariḥ iti pratisaṃskartṛsūtramiti kṛtvā ṭīkākṛtā liḍvidhir upapāditaḥ iti
ariṣṭenoddhūtāḥ paśupasudṛśo yānti vipadaṃ tṛṇāvartākrānto racayati bhayaṃ catvaracayaḥ
prasūnānāṃ gandhaṃ kathamitarathā vātanihitaṃ bhajan sadyomūrchāṃ vahati nivaho gopasudṛśām
ramayati sudṛśam kāmapi subhṛśam khalahaladharasodare
vṛṣyaṃ vaktrarujāpahaṃ pratanute kāntiṃ tanor dehināṃ liptaṃ suptamanojasindhuramadārambhādisaṃrambhadam
unmīlitānīva bhavanti supte śailadrumāṃs te gaganaṃ ca yānti
suptaṃ dvāḥsthamukhāc chrutvā dadau śāpaṃ nṛpāya saḥ
mānasaṃ hṛdayaṃ svāntaṃ cittaṃ ceto manaśca hṛt
hare dattasvāntā bhavati tadimāṃ kiṃ prabhavati smaro hantuṃ kiṃtu vyathayati bhavān eva kutukī
parihara kṛtātaṅke śaṅkām tvayā satatam ghanastanajaghanayā ākrānte svānte parānavakāśini
pītamātre bhavenmūrchā svāsthyaṃ syāt praharatrayāt
dhāturāhāro yeṣāṃ te dhātvāhārāḥ dhātavo rasādayo nityaṃ kṣīyamāṇā aśitādijanitadhātvāhārā eva santaḥ paraṃ svāsthyamanuvartante nānyathetyarthaḥ
na tat svāsthyādṛte śakyaṃ vaktum anyena hetunā
śaṃ no devīr iti svamūrdhni prokṣya jayān abhyātānān rāṣṭrabhṛto vyāhṛtīś ca hutvājyaśeṣaṃ prāṇāyāmena prāśnīyāt
brahmacārī svanāma saṃkīrtyābhivādayed ahaṃ bho iti
tadbhāryāputrayoḥ svaśiṣyasya coparame manuṣyayajñe śrāddhabhojane caikāham anadhyāyaḥ syāt āpadārtyor aprāyatye

svabhāvena mṛtasya bhekasyodaraṃ vidārya sphāṭikojjvalaṭaṅkaṇakṣārasyātisūkṣmāḥ khoṭāṃs tatra kṣiptvā tato ghṛtatailādinā digdhvā madhye sthāli bhekaṃ muktvopari pradhvarāṃ ḍhaṅkaṇīyaṃ dattvā bhūmimadhye sthālī nikhanyate
tanvyā sarvamidaṃ svabhāvajamiti vyāhṛtya pakṣmāntaravyāpī bāṣpabharastayā calitayā niḥśvasya mukto'nyataḥ
ṛtoḥ svabhāvācca madodbhavācca phullāsu śākhāsu nilīnapakṣāḥ
paurvapauruṣikaṃ nidhiṃ jānapadaḥ śuciḥ svakaraṇena samagraṃ labheta
svakaraṇābhāve pañcaśato daṇḍaḥ pracchannādāne sahasram
saṃsthādhyakṣaḥ paṇyasaṃsthāyāṃ purāṇabhāṇḍānāṃ svakaraṇaviśuddhānām ādhānaṃ vikrayaṃ vā sthāpayet

svayam evāgniṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtyājyena prājāpatyaṃ dhātādīn mindāhutī vicchinnam aindraṃ vaiśvadevaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ brāhmyaṃ viṣṇornukādīn prājāpatyasūktaṃ tadvratabandhaṃ ca punaḥ pradhānān hutvā prājāpatyavrataṃ badhnāti

bhaktyā viṣṇuṃ dhyāyann agnihotraśrāmaṇakāgnihomau dvikālaṃ notsṛjan grāmyāśanaṃ tyaktvā vanyauṣadhīḥ phalaṃ mūlaṃ śākaṃ vā nityāśanaṃ saṃkalpya tirodhā bhūr ityāhṛtyāparāhṇe svayaṃ patnī vā haviṣyam āsrāvitaṃ pacati
mūlaiḥ phalaiḥ pattraiḥ puṣpair vā tattatkālena pakvaiḥ svayam eva saṃśīrṇaiḥ prāṇaṃ pravartayann uttarottare 'py adhikaṃ tapaḥsaṃyogaṃ phalādiviśiṣṭam ācaret
haihayās tālajaṅghāś ca śūrāś ca śaśabindavaḥ
sa haihayān samutsādya tālajaṅghāṃś ca bhārata
nihato brahmadaṇḍena tālajaṅghas tathaiva ca
vaiśyataḥ śūdrāyāṃ cūcukaḥ kramukatāmbūlaśarkarādikrayavikrayī
tayā ca bhojanamauṣadhatāmbūlāsvādapānīyapānavelāṃ varjayitvaikaṃ māsaṃ nirantaraṃ mukhe dhāraṇīyā
ekatrāsanasaṃsthitiḥ parihatā pratyudgamād dūratas tāmbūlānayanacchalena rabhasāśleṣo'pi saṃvighnitaḥ
kāñcanais tāpanīyaiś ca sphāṭikai rājatais tathā
dadarśa tāpanīyāni kuṇḍalānyaṅgadāni ca
tāpanīyā surucirā dhvajayaṣṭir anuttamā

dhavāśvakarṇaśirīṣatiniśapalāśapicumardapāṭalipāribhadrakāmrodumbarakarahāṭakārjunakakubhasarjakapītanaśleṣmātakāṅkoṭhāmalakapragrahakuṭajaśamīkapitthāśmantakārkacirabilvamahāvṛkṣāruṣkarāralumadhukamadhuśigruśākagojīmūrvābhūrjatilvakekṣurakagopaghoṇṭārimedānāṃ bhasmānyāhṛtya gavāṃ mūtreṇa kṣārakalpena parisrāvya vipacet dadyāccātra pippalīmūlataṇḍulīyakavarāṅgacocamañjiṣṭhākarañjikāhastipippalīmaricaviḍaṅgagṛhadhūmānantāsomasaralābāhlīkaguhākośāmra śvetasarṣapavaruṇalavaṇaplakṣaniculakavañjulavakrālavardhamānaputraśreṇīsaptaparṇaṭuṇṭukailavālukanāgadantyativiṣābhayābhadradārukuṣṭhaharidrāvacācūrṇāni lohānāṃ ca samabhāgāni tataḥ kṣāravadāgatapākamavatārya lohakumbhe nidadhyāt
taṇḍulīyakakalkaṃ tu lihyāttatra samākṣikam
taṇḍulīyakamūleṣu sarpiḥ siddhaṃ pibennaraḥ

tena khalu samayena kāśyapo nāma śāstā loke utpannaḥ tathāgato 'rhan samyaksaṃbuddho vidyācaraṇasampannaḥ sugato lokavid anuttaraḥ puruṣadamyasārathiḥ śāstā devamanuṣyāṇāṃ buddho bhagavān yasya antike bodhisattvo bhagavān āyatyāṃ bodhāya praṇidhāya brahmacaryaṃ caritvā tuṣite devanikāye upapannaḥ

anekaśakrabrahmanāgakanyākoṭibhiḥ pratyudgamyamāno laṅkāmalayamavalokya smitamakarot pūrvakairapi tathāgatairarhadbhiḥ samyaksaṃbuddhairasmiṃllaṅkāpurīmalayaśikhare svapratyātmāryajñānatarkadṛṣṭitīrthyaśrāvakapratyekabuddhāryaviṣaye tadbhāvito dharmo deśitaḥ

aśrauṣīdrāvaṇo rākṣasādhipatistathāgatādhiṣṭhānāt bhagavān kila sāgaranāgarājabhavanāduttīrya anekaśakrabrahmanāgakanyākoṭibhiḥ parivṛtaḥ puraskṛtaḥ samudrataraṃgānavalokya ālayavijñānodadhipravṛttivijñānapavanaviṣaye preritāstebhyaḥ saṃnipatitebhyaścittānyavalokya tasminneva sthitaḥ udānamudānayati sma yannvahaṃ gatvā bhagavantamadhyeṣya laṅkāṃ praveśayeyam
kāraṇair bahubhis tathyair vāryamāṇau na cecchataḥ
idaṃ tathyaṃ mama vacas tvam avehi ca rāghava
vijñāya hy ātmano vīryaṃ tathyaṃ bhavitum arhasi
takrasārasamaṃ kṣīraṃ gomūtraṃ dviguṇaṃ bhavet
tathā takre niśāyukte taptataptaṃ ca dāpayet
krāmaṇe tu bhavettakraṃ śarkarā mākṣikaṃ tathā
dravyavyayaṃ prakurvanto mudhā tāmyanti bāliśāḥ
tanvyā yat suratāntatāntanayanaṃ vaktraṃ rativyatyaye tattvāṃ pātu cirāya kiṃ hariharabrahmādibhirdaivataiḥ
nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ

viḍaḥ vakṣyamāṇalakṣaṇalakṣitaḥ yantraṃ koṣṭhikādikaṃ tadādiyogataḥ atrādipadena mūṣāpuṭādīnāṃ grahaṇaṃ drutasya garbhe taralitasya grāsasya svarṇādeḥ parīṇāmaḥ paripākaḥ svātmani abhedarūpeṇa pariṇamanam
kadācit khedāgniṃ vighaṭayitum antargatam asau sahālībhirlebhe taralitamanā yāmunataṭīm
ghanacayarucire racayati cikure taralitataruṇānane
tatraināṃ tarjanair ghoraiḥ punaḥ sāntvaiś ca maithilīm
sītāyāstrijaṭāyāśca rākṣasīnāṃ ca tarjanam
vanabhaṅge ca ko 'syārtho rākṣasīnāṃ ca tarjane
dayāsatyaśaucācārayutaḥ svādhyāyatarpaṇābhyām ṛṣīn yajñabalihomajalapuṣpādyair devān śrāddhaiḥ putraiś ca pitṝn balinā bhūtān annādyair manuṣyāṃś ca nityam arcayet

ato 'nyatamaṃ karma cikīrṣatā vaidyena pūrvam evopakalpayitavyāni yantraśastrakṣārāgniśalākāśṛṅgajalaukālābūjāmbavauṣṭhapicuprotasūtrapattrapaṭṭamadhughṛtavasāpayas tailatarpaṇakaṣāyālepanakalkavyajanaśītoṣṇodakakaṭāhādīni parikarmiṇaś ca snigdhāḥ sthirā balavantaḥ
tatra sadyo ghṛtaṃ peyaṃ tarpaṇaṃ ca samāgadham
kuntī purastāt tu babhūva teṣāṃ kṛṣṇā tiraścaiva babhūva pattaḥ
yatra cāpaśyata sa vai tiro varṣāṇi varṣati
na tad ūrdhvaṃ na tiryak ca nādho na ca tiraḥ punaḥ
priyam abhisarasyevaṃ mugdhe samāhataḍiṇḍimā yadi kimadhikatrāsotkampaṃ diśaḥ samudīkṣase
jalatrāsaṃ tu vidyāttaṃ riṣṭaṃ tad api kīrtitam
dig iyaṃ dakṣiṇā trāsād dṛśyate nopabhujyate
antar vedyāṃ sthitvā gārhapatyādīn yā te 'gne yajñiyeti pratyekaṃ trir āghrāya bhavataṃ naḥ samanasāv ity ātmany āropayet
bhūr bhuvaḥ svaḥ saṃnyastaṃ mayeti trir upāṃśūccaiś ca praiṣam uktvā dakṣiṇahastena sakṛj jalaṃ pītvācamya tathaivoktvā trir jalāñjaliṃ visṛjet
retasas trir ity eke
tuṃbaruṃ bhārṅgikāṃ rāsnāṃ kaṅkolaṃ corapuṣkaram
tumbaruḥ saurabhaḥ sauro vanajaḥ sānujo dvijaḥ
tumbarur madhuras tiktaḥ kaṭūṣṇaḥ kaphavātanut
turaṃgaughair avatatā vāraṇaiś ca mahājavaiḥ
sa pūrayan khaṃ ca mahīṃ ca sācalāṃ turaṃgamataṅgamahārathasvanaiḥ
sa evam uktvā jvalanaprakāśaṃ rathaṃ turaṃgottamarājiyuktam
kathayāmi hi te tattvaṃ sāvadhāno 'vadhāraya
aupāsanahomaṃ hutvāgnim ayaṃ te yonir ity araṇyām āropayet
praṇamyāgniṃ pariṣicyāgne prāyaścitte tvam iti pañcaprāyaścittaṃ hutvāpo hiraṇyapavamānair ātmānaṃ prokṣya brahmadaivatyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ pañcavāruṇaṃ ca pradhānān vyāhṛtyantaṃ yajet
udbhrāntahṛdayaś cāpi vivarṇavadano 'bhavat
krīḍitas tv eṣa naḥ putrān bālān udbhrāntacetanaḥ
dṛṣṭvā svapnagataṃ rāmam udbhramāmi vicetanaḥ
vanyān eva pārthivān vānaspatyān kulīroddhatāñchaṇān purāṇān kuśadarbhān ūrṇāstukāṃ plakṣāgraṃ sugandhitejanaṃ gugguluṃ hiraṇyaśakalān sūryakāntaṃ ca saṃbharati
atyaṅkuśam ivoddāmaṃ gajaṃ madabaloddhatam
kapotāṅgāruṇo dhūmo dṛśyate pavanoddhataḥ

tāvanme pitaraṃ taskaramiva paścādbaddhabhujam uddhuradhvanimahājanānuyātam ānīya madabhyāśa eva sthāpayitvā mātaṅgastriraghoṣayat eṣa mantrī kāmapālo rājyalobhād bhartāraṃ caṇḍasiṃham yuvarājaṃ caṇḍaghoṣaṃ ca viṣānnenopāṃśu hatvā punardevo 'pi siṃhaghoṣaḥ pūrṇayauvana ityamuṣminpāpamācariṣyanviśvāsādrahasyabhūmau punaramātyaṃ śivanāgamāhūya sthūṇamaṅgāravarṣaṃ ca rājavadhāyopajapya taiḥ svāmibhaktyā vivṛtaguhyo rājyakāmukasyāsya brāhmaṇasyāndhatamasapraveśo nyāyya iti prāḍvivākavākyād akṣyuddharaṇāya nīyate
teṣv eva pratisaṃvidhānavikalaṃ paśyatsu sākṣiṣv iva drāg darpoddhuram āgateṣv api na sa kṣīyeta yady anyathā
etacchrutvā tathetyuktvā sa vaiṣṇavavaroddhuraḥ
kṛtātithyo 'tha rāmas tu sūryasyodayanaṃ prati
te patanti jale nityaṃ sūryasyodayanaṃ prati
anāsādyaiva patito bhāskarodayane girau
kāmaṃ bandhaiśca me bhūyaḥ pucchasyoddīpanena ca
iṣubhiriva sutīkṣṇair mānasaṃ māninīnāṃ tudati kusumamāso manmathoddīpanāya

araṇījanitaṃ kāntodbhavaṃ vā agnihotrajaṃ vā tāmrapātre śarāve vā ānīya nirīkṣaṇatāḍanābhyukṣaṇaprakṣālanam ādyena kravyādā śivaparityāgo 'pi prathamena vahnes traikāraṇaṃ jaṭharabhrūmadhyād āvāhyāgniṃ vaikāraṇamūrtāvāgneyena uddīpanamādyena puruṣeṇa saṃhitayā dhāraṇā dhenumudrāṃ turīyeṇāvaguṇṭhya jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā śarāvotthāpanaṃ kuṇḍopari nidhāya pradakṣiṇamāvartya turīyeṇātmasammukhāṃ vāgīśvarīṃ garbhanāḍyāṃ garbhādhānāntarīyeṇa kamalapradānamādyena vauṣaḍantena kuśārghyaṃ dattvā indhanapradānamādyena prajvālanaṃ garbhādhānaṃ ca sadyenādyena pūjanaṃ vāmena pūjanaṃ dvitīyena sīmantonnayanam aghoreṇa tṛtīyena pūjanam
ṣaṭpadodgītaninadair vighuṣṭaṃ sāmagair iva
vāsudeva tad etat te mayodgītaṃ yathātatham
nārāyaṇamukhodgītaṃ nārado 'śrāvayat punaḥ
vānarair uhyamānāṃ tāṃ śūrair udvahanocitaiḥ
rathodvahanakhinnāśca ta ime rathavājinaḥ
tatra praspandanodvahanapūraṇavivekadhāraṇalakṣaṇo vāyuḥ pañcadhā pravibhaktaḥ śarīraṃ dhārayati
lakṣayāmāsa sodvegam athautsukyaṃ tapasvinām
sītā prāvepatodvegāt pravāte kadalī yathā
sodvego bhavati ca mūtratulyagandhiḥ sa jñeyaḥ śiśuriha vaktramaṇḍikārtaḥ
bahunātra kimuktena rasāyanamayaṃ nṛṇām
asatyoktāḥ striyaḥ sarvā na kaṇvaṃ vaktum arhasi
śṛṇvatāṃ lomaśoktāni vākyāni vividhāni ca
niḥśvāsā vadanaṃ dahanti hṛdayaṃ nirmūlamunmathyate nidrā neti na dṛśyate priyamukhaṃ rātriṃdivaṃ rudyate
nāgahetoḥ suparṇena caityam unmathitaṃ yathā
tataś conmathya sahasā hariṣye janakātmajām
acūcudat sārathim unnadan punar mahābalo megha ivāśmavarṣavān
nadantaś connadantaś ca garjantaś ca plavaṃgamāḥ
jaladā iva connedur yātudhānāḥ sahasraśaḥ
utthāpanair unnayanaiścālanaiḥ sthāpanair api

pūrvavad dhātādi hutvā treṇyā śalalyā saha śalāṭuglapsaṃ sāgrapattraṃ kuśāṅkuraṃ ca darbheṇa trir ābadhyoṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ suvar iti gṛhītvā tasyāstathāsīnāyāḥ sraggandhavatyāḥ sīmante rākāmahaṃ yāste rāka iti sthāpayitvonnayanaṃ kuryāt
tathordhvārohaṇād utkarṣād unnayanād vodāno nābhideśamastakāntargocaras tatrodāne yat spandanaṃ tat sarvendriyāṇāṃ sāmānyā vṛttiḥ
unnidratātṛḍbhramaromaharṣā jṛmbhātivāktvaṃ ca calāt sapittāt
śūlam unnidratā śoṣaḥ kāsaḥ śvāsaśca jāyate
tavānanam ivonnidram aravindam abhūd iti
sarvāṇi cāṅgopāṅgāni sugrīvaṃ bhayam āviśat
sa khilān sopaniṣadān sāṅgopāṅgān yathāvidhi
tava putre mahābāhau sāṅgopāṅgaṃ mahātmani
anena ca rasakarmopadeśena doṣāṇāmapi tattadrasotpādyatvaṃ tathā tattadrasopaśamanīyatvam uktaṃ bhavati
pittopaśamanīyāni pākyāni śiśirāṇi ca
kṣaudralavaṇamadyāni gavādiśakṛnmūtrapittāni evaṃvidhāni cendriyopaśamanīyāny anyānyapi
grahāḥ sopagrahāś caiva ṛṣayo mātaras tathā
amitropagrahaṃ cāsya te kuryuḥ kṣipram āpadi
adṛṣṭanara ādiṣṭa ātmāmiṣa upagrahaḥ
virathaṃ bhrātaraṃ kṛtvā bhīmasenam upāhasat
evaṃ sa bahuśo rājan purodhasam upāhasat
karakisalayakāntiṃ pallavairvidrumābhair upahasati vasantaḥ kāminīnāmidānīm
vṛkaḥ kukkurānukārī paśuśatruḥ tarakṣuḥ vyāghrabhedaḥ taraccha iti khyātaḥ babhruḥ atilomaśaḥ kukkuraḥ parvatopakaṇṭhe bhavati kecid bṛhannakulam āhuḥ
jagatprasūtir jagadekapāvanī vrajopakaṇṭhaṃ tanayair upeyuṣī
hṛdayam ahṛdayā na nāma pūrvaṃ bhavadupakaṇṭham upāgataṃ viveda
atha paścāt prāṅmukho 'vahantum upakramate dakṣiṇottarābhyāṃ pāṇibhyām
paryukṣya sthālīpāke ājyam ānīya hotum eva upakramate
saṃkalpya vidhipūrvaṃ tu tataḥ snātum upakramet
upakṣiptasya cānnasya bāṣpeṇordhvaṃ prasarpatā
madhye bhittvā śiraścāsya sugrīvaṃ tad upākṣipat
vṛttim arhatyupakṣeptuṃ tvad anyaḥ kurusattama
yadyapyasyāḥ samyagāmnāyaḥ sāṃprataṃ nopalabhyate tathāpi kiṃcidakṣarārthaṃ yuktyā kiṃcidguṭikāntarānubhavena kiṃcit tathāvidhaśrutayuktyanusāreṇa vyākhyā
karāmalakavat sāpi pratyakṣaṃ nopalabhyate
trividhaṃ jāyate hema caturthaṃ nopalabhyate

śigrunāmno vṛkṣasya pattrāṇi gāḍhaṃ mṛkṣaṇopamānāni vartayitvā teṣāṃ piṇḍena kulhaḍīṃ kṛtvā tasyāṃ kulhaḍikāyāṃ pūrvavidhinā tāmraṃ parityajyodgīnaṃ rasaṃ tathā dvātriṃśattamena bhāgena lavaṇaṃ ca kṣiptvā tāṃ kulhaḍīṃ vastre baddhvā tadvastraṃ davarakeṇa kāṣṭhe baddhvā tatkāṣṭhaṃ sthālyāḥ kaṇṭhe kaṃcana paṭṭaṃ baddhvā sthālīmadhye tribhāganimbukarasasahitakāñjikaṃ kṣiptvā kāñjikopari ñūbamānā tathā vastraṃ baddhvā kulhaḍī moktavyā yathā kāñjikaṃ na lagati kevalaṃ bāṣpo lagati
karṣaṃ vā kuḍachī vā ghṛtenābhyajya tatastatra gandhakaṃ kṣiptvādho 'gnir jvālanīyaḥ tāvad yāvad gandhakas tailopamāno bhavati tatas tadgandhakatailaṃ dugdhamadhye ḍhālyate tato dugdhaṃ na gṛhyate
etenaivopamānena nityajihmā hi rākṣasāḥ
tadeṣopaniṣatproktā mayā vyāsa sanātanā
mātror abhyupapattiśca dharmopaniṣadaṃ prati
tato dharmopaniṣadaṃ bhūtvā bhartuḥ priyā pṛthā

iti tathā hārīte'pyuktaṃ rasaḥ saptāhādarvāk parivartamānaḥ śvetakapotaharitahāridrapadmakiṃśukālaktakarasaprakhyaś cāyaṃ yathākramaṃ divasaparivartād varṇaparivartam āpadyamānaḥ pittoṣmoparāgācchoṇitatvam āpadyate iti tathā suśrute 'pyuktaṃ sa khalvāpyo rasa ekaikasmin dhātau trīṇi trīṇi kalāsahasrāṇi pañcadaśa ca kalā avatiṣṭhate evaṃ māsena rasaḥ śukrībhavati iti
droṇasūryoparāgaṃ ca hṛdayaṃ me vidīryate
tataḥ prabhṛti saṃkrāntāv uparāgādiparvasu
upāsarpata dīnātmā tāta tāteti cābravīt
tiṣṭhataivātra saṃtuṣṭā nopasarpitum arhatha
nopasarpāmy ahaṃ bhīto bhaye sarve hi bibhyati
mithilopavane tatra āśramaṃ dṛśya rāghavaḥ
nagaropavanaṃ gatvā yathā sma ramate purā
agarūṇāṃ ca mukhyānāṃ vanāny upavanāni ca
tataḥ śakropayānaṃ tu paryapṛcchat sa rāghavaḥ
ihopayānaṃ sarveṣām eteṣāṃ vanacāriṇām
upayānāpayāne ca sthānaṃ pratyapasarpaṇam
etacca vṛddhikāraṇatvaṃ sāmānyasya na lakṣaṇaṃ kiṃ tarhyāyurvedopayoginā dharmeṇa nirdeśaḥ lakṣaṇaṃ tu sāmānyamekatvakaram iti kariṣyati
kiṃciditi āyurvedopayogidravyasvarūpaṃ na sarvam aprasaṅgadoṣād iti bhāvaḥ

atra ca paratvāparatvādīnām ihānabhidhānena cikitsāyāṃ paratvādīnām aprādhānyaṃ darśayati ye 'pi tatrāpi yuktisaṃyogaparimāṇasaṃskārābhyāsā atyarthacikitsopayogino 'pi na te pārthivādidravyāṇāṃ śabdādivat sāṃsiddhikāḥ kiṃ tarhy ādheyāḥ ata iha naisargikaguṇakathane noktāḥ
bāhye coḍḍīya no yāti sthitaḥ sthāne sthirāyate
tataḥ sūta uḍḍīyoparitanasthālyāṃ yāti
tathā pāradāddviguṇe dhānyābhrakeṇa jīrṇe'gniṃ tāpayettato raso dhūmena kṛtoḍḍīya yāti
devānāṃ ca ṛṣīṇāṃ ca gandharvoragarakṣasām
tatpūjitaṃ devamanuṣyasiddhai rakṣobhirugrairuragaiśca divyaiḥ
tatastatra svayaṃ brahmā saha devoragādibhiḥ

śam naḥ devīḥ abhiṣṭaye āpaḥ bhavantu pītaye śam yos abhisravantu naḥ priyāḥ śam naḥ āpaḥ dhanvanyāḥ śam naḥ santu nūpyāḥ śam naḥ samudryāḥ āpaḥ śam u naḥ santu kūpyāḥ śam naḥ mitraḥ śam varuṇaḥ śam naḥ bhavatu aryamā śam naḥ indraḥ ca agniḥ ca śam naḥ viṣṇuḥ uru kramaḥ iti
dharmas tu gajanāsoru sadbhir ācaritaḥ purā
girivaram uruvikramaḥ prayātaḥ sa śubhamatiḥ saha rāmalakṣmaṇābhyām
sarvāṇi vāditrāṇy abhimantrayate yā caturdhā pravadaty agnau yā vāte yā bṛhatyuta
so 'smāndevo 'ryamā preto muñcātu māmuta
praharaviratau madhye vāhnastato'pi pare'thavā kimuta sakale jāte vāhṇi priya tvamihaiṣyasi
krānteḥ kramotkrammajye dve kṛtvā tatrotkramajyayā
vāyor anyatra tajjāṃs tu tair evotkramayojitaiḥ
kramāvahīnam utkramam avijñātaṃ punaruktaṃ vā vastukam avalikhato dvādaśapaṇo daṇḍaḥ

ata ūrdhvaṃ sarvavraṇavedanā vakṣyāmaḥ todanabhedanatāḍanacchedanāyamanamanthanavikṣepaṇacumucumāyananirdahanāvabhañjanasphoṭanavidāraṇotpāṭanakampanavividhaśūlaviśleṣaṇavikiraṇapūraṇastambhanasvapnākuñcanāṅkuśikāḥ sambhavanti animittavividhavedanāprādurbhāvo vā muhurmuhuryatrāgacchanti vedanāviśeṣāstaṃ vātikamiti vidyāt oṣacoṣaparidāhadhūmāyanāni yatra gātram aṅgārāvakīrṇam iva pacyate yatra coṣmābhivṛddhiḥ kṣate kṣārāvasiktavac ca vedanāviśeṣāstaṃ paittikamiti vidyāt pittavadraktasamutthaṃ jānīyāt kaṇḍūrgurutvaṃ suptatvam upadeho 'lpavedanatvaṃ stambhaḥ śaityaṃ ca yatra taṃ ślaiṣmikamiti vidyāt yatra sarvāsāṃ vedanānāmutpattistaṃ sāṃnipātikamiti vidyāt
abaddhamūlaḥ kṣupako yadvadutpāṭane sukhaḥ
nikhātotpāṭanaṃ bhaṅgaḥ patanaṃ nirgamastathā
bhinnapātre 'nnaṃ paryuṣitaṃ śayanāsanotsaṅgasthaṃ vā na bhuñjīta
yato yato gatiṃ vidyād utsaṅgo yatra yatra ca
athāsyā brahmacāriṇaṃ jīvapitṛkaṃ jīvamātṛkam utsaṅgamupaveśayet
śāpotsargāddhi tasyedaṃ muneḥ sarvam upāgatam
utsargo bahirniḥsaraṇaṃ saṃśodhanarūpameṣāṃ śāstroktamasti utsargaṃ vā vahantītyutsargiṇaḥ
saṃgotsargāv atīva ceti atīva saṅgaḥ apravṛttiḥ atyutsargastu atipravṛttiḥ
kiṃca snigdharasālamaulimukulāni ālokya harṣodayāt unmīlanti kuhūḥ kuhūḥ iti kalottālāḥ pikānām giraḥ
eteṣāṃ sottālā gatiḥ sūcyate
tataḥ parasparaspardhādarśitottālamaṇḍalau
uṣeva sūryaṃ madanaṃ ratīva maheśvaraṃ parvatarājaputrī
sāyāmā bhṛśadāhoṣā gambhīre 'dhikapūrvaruk
durgā uṣā śacī jyeṣṭhā mātaraḥ surapūjitāḥ

audumbaro 'kṛṣṭaphalāvāpyauṣadhibhojī mūlaphalāśī vāṇahiṅgulaśunamadhumatsyamāṃsapūtyannadhānyāmlaparasparśanaparapākavarjī devarṣipitṛmanuṣyapūjī vanacaro grāmabahiṣkṛtaḥ sāyaṃ prātar agnihotraṃ hutvā śrāmaṇakāgnihomaṃ vaiśvadevahomaṃ kurvaṃs tapaḥ samācarati
vadhyān hatvā tadvastrādigrāhī parādhīnāhāro bhinnapātrabhojī śvamāṃsabhakṣī carmavāravāṇavāṇijyakārī syāt
vāṇair bāṇaiḥ samāsaktaṃ śaṅke 'śaṃ kena śāmyati
pratiṣṭhitāyāṃ vārttāyāṃ pravṛtte vṛṣṭisarjane
vārttāyāṃ saṃśritas tāta loko hi sukham edhate
nanu saccidānandātmakaparatattvasphuraṇādeva muktisiddhau kim anena divyadehasampādanaprayāseneti cet tad etad avārttaṃ vārttaśarīrālābhe tadvārttāyā ayogāt
pratyujjagāma saṃhṛṣṭo brahmāṇam iva vāsavaḥ
tasya parvaṇi taṃ yajñaṃ yajamānasya vāsavaḥ
bibheda ca mahātejā rudantam api vāsavaḥ
agnaye somāya prajāpataye dhanvantaraye vāstoṣpataye viśvebhyo devebhyo 'gnaye sviṣṭakṛte ca juhuyāt
jātaśilāsu maṇikaṃ pratiṣṭhāpayati vāstoṣpata ity etena dvikena sarcena
vāstoṣpate pinākāya muktaye kevalāya ca
ālambyāṅgaṇavāṭikāparisare cūtadrume mañjarīṃ sarpatsāndraparāgalampaṭaraṇadbhṛṅgāṅganāśobhinīm
jyāmukta iva nārācaḥ pupluve vṛkṣavāṭikām
caṣakaṃ ca kaṭorī ca vāṭikā khārikā tathā
brāhmaṇānāṃ cāturāśramyaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ trayāśramyaṃ vaiśyānāṃ dvyāśramyaṃ vihitaṃ tatphalaṃ hi sakāmaṃ niṣkāmaṃ ceti dvividhaṃ bhavati
brāhmaṇo hṛdgābhiḥ kṣatriyaḥ kaṇṭhagābhir vaiśyas tālugābhir adbhir ācāmet
adhastād ūrubhyām utpannād vaiśyād vaiśyāyāṃ tathā vaiśyaḥ śuddhaḥ
rathyālivīkṣaṇaniveśitaloladṛṣṭer nūnaṃ chanacchaniti bāṣpakaṇāḥ patanti
dagdhamapyatha deveśa vīkṣaṇena puratrayam
syāt tena śiśur ucchūnatāmrākṣo vīkṣaṇākṣamaḥ
abhūdṛṣiḥ sa dharmātmā śilādo nāma vīryavān
vīryavantaśca te jyeṣṭhā nirmalā balavattarāḥ
ko nv asmin sāmprataṃ loke guṇavān kaś ca vīryavān
śāśvatatvād anantaśca govindo vedanād gavām
na vedādhyayanairvāpi na vittena na vedanaiḥ
tāsāṃ savarṇāvedane pāṇir grāhyaḥ
vedāṃsi vidyā mayi santu cāravo 'gniṣomā yaśo asmāsu dhattam
svasti na indro vṛddhaśravāḥ svasti naḥ pūṣā viśvavedāḥ
svasti na indro vṛddhaśravāḥ svasti naḥ pūṣā viśvavedāḥ
prabhavati khalu loke somatārārkajīvī kamalasadanasuśrīr nyāyaśāstrādivettā
cikīrṣitaṃ ca yo vettā yathā lokena saṃvṛtam
tvaṃ vai dharmān vijānīṣe yudhāṃ vettā dhanaṃjayaḥ
vibhūtiḥ khecarī caiva daśa dūtyaḥ krameṇa ca
pitāmahādyaṃ pravadanti ṣaṣṭhaṃ maharṣim akṣayyavibhūtiyuktam
yajñe vibhūtiṃ tāṃ dṛṣṭvā duḥkhāmarṣānvitasya ca
masāragalvarkamayair vibhaṅgair vibhūṣitaṃ hemapinaddhacakram
navajalakaṇasekādudgatāṃ romarājīṃ lalitavalivibhaṅgairmadhyadeśaiśca nāryaḥ
vinyastaśuklāguru cakrur asyā gorocanāpatravibhaṅgam aṅgam
agrahas taṃ vidhunvaṃs tu hastī hastam ivātmanaḥ
vidhūya śokaṃ parihṛṣṭamānasā maharṣiyāte pathi suvyavasthitāḥ
saṃraktanetraḥ śithilāmbaras tadā vidhūtasarvābharaṇaḥ paraṃtapaḥ
vikṣepaghny antyakarṇāptā vikṣepas trijyayā vidhoḥ
ciraṃ vihṛtyātha jagāma tārāṃ vidhurgṛhītvā svagṛhaṃ tato'pi
somasyeti cirādāha tato'gṛhṇādvidhuḥ sutam
śrībhāratīṃ ca vighneśaṃ vande pratyūhaśāntaye
vighneśena ca yo dhīmān śivasāyujyamāpnuyāt
vighneśo mātaro durgā kṣetrajño devatā diśaḥ
vimale ca prakāśete viśākhe nirupadrave
ākramyāṅgārakastasthau viśākhām api cāmbare
viśākhayormadhyagataḥ śaśīva vimalo divi
aparājitaḥ paṇḍitako viśālākṣo durādharaḥ
aparājitaḥ paṇḍitako viśālākṣo durāvaraḥ
śatānīkaḥ śataṃ hatvā viśālākṣaścatuḥśatam
dhik tvām adya praṇaśya tvaṃ yan mām evaṃ viśaṅkase
yadi doṣo mahāṃstasmiṃstyajyatām aviśaṅkitam
pṛcchyamāno viśaṅketa sahasā buddhimān vacaḥ
āśramaṃ caivamatyarthaṃ citrakūṭeti viśrutam
tathā śāliśirā yaśca viśruto gaṇḍamaṇḍakaḥ
kalkair eṣāṃ ghṛtaṃ siddhamajeyamiti viśrutam
tasminneva kāle sumatisumitrasumantrasuśrutānāṃ mantriṇāṃ pramatimitraguptamantraguptaviśrutākhyā mahābhikhyāḥ sūnavo navodyadindurucaś cirāyuṣaḥ samajāyanta
tathā niṣaṇṇaṃ ca tam upahāravarmārthapālapramatimitraguptamantraguptaviśrutair maithilena ca prahāravarmaṇā kāśībhartrā ca kāmapālena campeśvareṇa siṃhavarmaṇā sahopāgatya dhanamitraḥ praṇipapāta

tataste tatra saṃgatā apahāravarmopahāravarmārthapālapramatimitraguptamantraguptaviśrutāḥ kumārāḥ pāṭalipure yauvarājyamupabhuñjānaṃ samākāraṇe pūrvakṛtasaṃketaṃ vāmalocanayā bhāryayā saha kumāraṃ somadattaṃ sevakairānāyya sarājavāhanāḥ sambhūyāvasthitā mithaḥ sapramodasaṃvalitāḥ kathā yāvadvidadhati tāvatpuṣpapurādrājño rājahaṃsasyājñāpatramādāya samāgatā rājapuruṣāḥ praṇamya rājavāhanaṃ vyajijñapan svāmin etajjanakasya rājahaṃsasyājñāpatraṃ gṛhyatām ityākarṇya samutthāya bhūyobhūyaḥ sādaraṃ praṇamya sadasi tadājñāpatramagrahīt
śrāmaṇakayajñaṃ yajñadaivataviśvān devānityantam āvāhyājyaṃ nirūpya śrāmaṇakāya svāhā śrāmaṇakayajñāya svāhā yajñadaivataviśvebhyo devebhyaḥ svāhety antaṃ hutvā caruṃ juhuyād ity ādhāraviśeṣaḥ

agner dakṣiṇe darbheṣūttarāgreṣu dakṣiṇādy arcayitvā nārāyaṇāya sahasraśīrṣāya sahasrākṣāya sahasrapādāya paramapuruṣāya paramātmane parajyotiṣe parabrahmaṇe 'vyaktāya sarvakāraṇāya yajñeśvarāya yajñātmane viśvebhyo devebhyaḥ sarvābhyo devatābhyaḥ sādhyebhya ityetair nama ityantaiḥ pāyasaṃ baliṃ dattvājyam ebhir juhoti

kāmam purastāt dhuraḥ juhoti yuktaḥ vaha jātavedas purastāt idam viddhi kriyamāṇam yathā iha tvam bhiṣaj bheṣajasya asi goptā tvayā prasūtāḥ gām aśvam pūruṣam sanema viśvā agne tvayā vayam dhārāḥ udanyāḥ iva atigāhemahi dviṣam iti
sureśaḥ śaraṇaṃ śarma viśvaretāḥ prajābhavaḥ
nīlakaṇṭhaṃ viśvamūrtiṃ vyāpinaṃ viśvaretasam
dhātā vidhātā vidhivedhasau dhruvaḥ purāṇago haṃsagaviśvaretasau
tad gacchata vicinvadhvaṃ putrakā bhadram astu vaḥ
sādhu sainyāḥ pratiṣṭhantāṃ vicinvantu ca kānanam
sā taṃ samprekṣya suśroṇī kusumāni vicinvatī

tadyathā śrotriyanṛpatistrībālavṛddhabhīrurājasevakakitavadurbalavaidyavidagdhavyādhigopakadaridrakṛpaṇakrodhanānām anātmavatām anāthānāṃ ca evaṃ nirūpya cikitsāṃ kurvan dharmārthakāmayaśāṃsi prāpnoti
vidagdhaścaturaścaiva prauḍho boddhā viśāradaḥ
vidagdhe vamanaṃ yad vā yathāvasthaṃ hitaṃ bhavet
diśo vā vidiśo vāpi suvyaktaṃ na cakāśire
bāṇaughavitatāḥ sarvā diśaśca vidiśastathā
te diśo vidiśaḥ sarvāḥ pratirudhya prahāriṇaḥ
vidravanti bhayād bhītā nānādigbhyaḥ sahasraśaḥ
tāṃś ca vidravato dṛṣṭvā taṃ ca śrutvā sa niḥsvanam
hṛtadārān sadārāṃś ca daśa vidravato diśaḥ
haṃsireṇānnavidveṣo jṛmbhā romṇāṃ ca harṣaṇam
tayor anyataraḥ praiti vidveṣaṃ cādhigacchati
tatra saṃcitānāṃ khalu doṣāṇāṃ stabdhapūrṇakoṣṭhatā pītāvabhāsatā mandoṣmatā cāṅgānāṃ gauravamālasyaṃ cayakāraṇavidveṣaś ceti liṅgāni bhavanti
nardamānāṃś ca nādena pātayeyur vihaṃgamān
śyenagāmī pṛthugrīvo yajñaśatrur vihaṃgamaḥ
vane prajvalitasyeva sparśam agner vihaṃgamaḥ
tad vijṛmbhasva vikrāntaḥ plavatām uttamo hyasi
yathā vijṛmbhate siṃho vivṛddho girigahvare
laṅkām abhimukhaḥ kopād abhīkṣṇaṃ ca vijṛmbhate
vicaranti mahīpālā yātrārthaṃ vijigīṣavaḥ
vijigīṣuḥ suhṛt kaccinmitreṣu ca paraṃtapaḥ
apramattaṃ kathaṃ taṃ tu vijigīṣuṃ bale sthitam
cārusmite cārudati cārunetre vilāsini
cārusmite cārudati cārunetre vilāsini
rājāno rājaputrāśca pṛthivyāṃ ye vilāsinaḥ
tatra valayabinduvilekhāpratisāraṇānīti dahanaviśeṣāḥ
chāyātapavilekhaṃ ca nimeṣonmeṣavihvalam
trirātropoṣitaḥ kṛṣṇacaturdaśyāṃ puṣyayoginyāṃ śvapākīhastād vilekhāvalekhanaṃ krīṇīyāt
sasena cid vimadāyāvaho vasv ājāv adriṃ vāvasānasya nartayan
yābhiḥ patnīr vimadāya nyūhathur ā gha vā yābhir aruṇīr aśikṣatam
yāv arbhagāya vimadāya jāyāṃ senājuvā nyūhatū rathena
yathātmanas tathānyeṣāṃ dārā rakṣyā vimarśanāt

tatra saṃvinmātramaye viśvasmin saṃvidi ca vimarśātmikāyāṃ vimarśasya ca śabdanātmakatāyāṃ siddhāyāṃ sakalajaganniṣṭhavastunaḥ tadgatasya ca karmaphalasambandhavaicitryasya yat vimarśanaṃ tad eva śāstram iti parameśvarasvabhāvābhinna eva samastaḥ śāstrasaṃdarbho vastuta ekaphalaprāpakaḥ ekādhikāryuddeśenaiva tatra tu parameśvaraniyatiśaktimahimnaiva bhāge bhāge rūḍhiḥ lokānām iti
mantravīryam iti proktaṃ pūrṇāhaṃtāvimarśanam
vyāvartakaś cakragajaś ca cakrī puṃnāḍapuṃnāṭavimardakāś ca
yanmūlaśca me durodarāvatāraḥ sa me vimardako nāma viśvāsyataraṃ dvitīyaṃ hṛdayamāsīt
tadahareva manniyogādvimardako 'rthapatisevābhiyuktas tasyodārake vairamabhyavardhayat
anāthaś caiva vṛddhaś ca mayā caiva vinākṛtaḥ
yatpradhānāsi tat pāpaṃ mayi pitrā vinākṛte
niṣpradhānām anekāgrāṃ narendreṇa vinākṛtām
rajaḥpurīṣendriyajaṃ hi viddhi sphoṭaṃ vipakvāmalapīlupāṇḍum
rasakriyāṃ vā triphalāvipakvāṃ palāśapuṣpaiḥ kharamañjarervā
gavāṃ śakṛtkvāthavipakvamuttamaṃ hitaṃ tu tailaṃ timireṣu nāvanam
loladbhrūlatayā vipakṣadigupanyāse'vadhūtaṃ śiras tadvṛttāntanirīkṣaṇe kṛtanamaskāro vilakṣaḥ sthitaḥ
ekasmiñśayane vipakṣaramaṇīnāmagrahe mugdhayā sadyaḥ kopaparāṅmukhaṃ śayitayā cāṭūni kurvannapi
vipakṣaśīlanāt pūrvaḥ karmajaḥ karmasaṃkṣayāt
sannipātena citrāṇi viplutāni ca paśyati
bhavet tu dīnavadano bhrāntaviplutamānasaḥ
saṃrāgaśokabhayaviplutacetasastu cintākṛto bhavati so 'śucidarśanācca

naiṣṭhikaḥ kāṣāyaṃ dhātuvastram ajinaṃ valkalaṃ vā paridhāya jaṭī śikhī vā mekhalī daṇḍī sūtrājinadhārī brahmacārī śucir akṣāralavaṇāśī yāvad ātmano viprayogas tāvad gurukule sthitvā niveditabhaikṣabhojī bhavati
saṃyogā viprayogāntā maraṇāntaṃ ca jīvitam
kadā śokam imaṃ ghoraṃ maithilīviprayogajam
muhurvirajyanti ca tāḥ samantād vyādhiḥ sirotpāta iti pradiṣṭaḥ

prathamaṃ hi mokṣopayogitvena guruvacanāt kriyāsaṃnyāsaḥ kṛta eva paraṃ svānubhavaviraktena na kṛtaḥ abhyāsād udbhūtena jñānena sākṣāddṛṣṭaṃ bhāvasvabhāvena yaḥ sarvasaṃnyāsaḥ kriyate tatra samūlāḥ sarvavedanā jñānādayaśca śarīroparamādevoparamante
tataḥ kadācid dharmātmā tṛptaḥ kāmād vyarajyata
saṅgaṃ tyaktvā niyamayamī priyaṃ satyaṃ vadan sarvabhūtasyāvirodhī samaḥ sadādhyātmarato dhyānayogī nārāyaṇaṃ paraṃ brahma paśyan dhāraṇāṃ dhārayet

tena yaducyate vairodhikānāṃ sarvadāpathyatvena nānauṣadhaṃ dravyam iti vaco virodhi tanna bhavati vairodhikāni hi saṃyogasaṃskāradeśakālādyapekṣāṇi bhavanti vairodhikasaṃyogādyabhāve tu pathyānyapi kvacit syuḥ
rasabhedavijñānādeva vaktavyaṃ yato rasabhedavad dravyameva vikārāṇāṃ heturbheṣajaṃ ca bhavatīti evaṃ doṣabhedaṃ jñātvā ca tasya samānaṃ hetuṃ pratyeti doṣavirodhi ca dravyaṃ bheṣajamiti
ityukte kva tad ityudīrya sahasā tatsampramārṣṭuṃ mayā sāśliṣṭā rabhasena tatsukhavaśāttanvyāpi tad vismṛtam
pratyāvṛttamukhī sabāṣpanayanā māṃ muñca muñceti sā kopātprasphuritādharā yadavadattatkena vismaryate
bhūtopahatacitteva viṣṭhitā vismṛtā sthitā
nikṛttakarṇanāsā tu visvaraṃ sā vinadya ca
visvaraṃ vyāhṛtaṃ vākyaṃ lakṣmaṇa trāhi mām iti
krośantī rāma rāmeti lakṣmaṇeti ca visvaram
parvasu ca vitardi chatra ullopikā hasta patākā chāga upahāraiḥ caitya pūjāḥ kārayet

tasmin mahāvimāne sukhopaviṣṭasya dvātriṃśadbhūmisahasrapratisaṃsthite vitardiniryūhatoraṇagavākṣakūṭāgāraprāsādatalasamalaṃkṛte ucchritachatradhvajapaṭākaratnakiṅkiṇījālavitānavitate māndāravamahāmāndāravapuṣpasaṃstaraṇasaṃstṛte apsarasaḥkoṭīniyutaśatasahasrasaṃgītisaṃpracalite atimuktakacampakapāṭalakovidāramucilindamahāmucilindāśokanyagrodhatindukāsanakarṇikārakeśarasālaratnavṛkṣopaśobhite hemajālasaṃchanne mahatā pūrṇakumbhopaśobhite samatalavyūhopaśobhite jyotirmālikāsumanovāte devakoṭīniyutaśatasahasrābhimukhanayanāvalokitāloke mahāvipuladharmasaṃgītisarvakāmarativegakleśacchedane vyapagatākhilakrodhapratighamānamadadarpāpanayane prītiprasādaprāmodyottaptavipulasmṛtisaṃjanane sukhopaviṣṭasya tasmin mahādharmasāṃkathye pravṛtte tebhyaścaturaśītibhyas tūryasaṃgītisahasranirnāditebhyo bodhisattvasya pūrvaśubhakarmopacayenemāḥ saṃcodanāgāthā niścaranti sma

apare 'pyāhuḥ iyaṃ vaiśālī mahānagarī ṛddhā ca sphītā ca kṣemā ca subhikṣā ca ramaṇīyā cākīrṇabahujanamanuṣyā ca vitardiniryūhatoraṇagavākṣaharmyakūṭāgāraprāsādatalasamalaṃkṛtā ca puṣpavāṭikāvanarājisaṃkusumitā ca amarabhavanapuraprākāśyā
pathi grāme vivītānte na doṣaḥ
akṛṣyāyāṃ bhūmau paśubhyo vivītāni prayacchet
grāmāntareṣu vā muṣitaṃ pravāsitaṃ vivītādhyakṣo dadyāt
tato rudantyo vivaśā vilapya ca punaḥ punaḥ
āsīt kruddhas tu kākutstho vivaśas tena mohitaḥ
vivaśāpahṛtā sītā rāvaṇeneti śaṃsata
viṣayo viṣayitvaṃ ca saṃbandho 'yam ihocyate
viṣayī puruṣo nityaṃ sattvaṃ ca viṣayaḥ smṛtaḥ
viṣayo viṣayitvaṃ ca tadā hyarthapadātmakau
atha sa vrajamānastu vyāghreṇābhīṣito dvijaḥ
namaḥ parvatavāsebhyo vyāghrarūpebhya eva ca
strīrajo vyāghramadhyasthaṃ padmasūtreṇa veṣṭayet

pratimarśaścaturdaśasu kāleṣūpādeyas tadyathā talpotthitena prakṣālitadantena gṛhānnirgacchatā vyāyāmavyavāyādhvapariśrāntena mūtroccārakavalāñjanānte bhuktavatā charditavatā divāsvapnotthitena sāyaṃ ceti

tatra talpotthitenāsevitaḥ pratimarśo rātrāvupacitaṃ nāsāsrotogataṃ malam upahanti manaḥprasādaṃ ca karoti prakṣālitadantenāsevito dantānāṃ dṛḍhatāṃ vadanasaugandhyaṃ cāpādayati gṛhānnirgacchatā sevito nāsāsrotasaḥ klinnatayā rajodhūmo vā na bādhate vyāyāmamaithunādhvapariśrāntenāsevitaḥ śramam upahanti mūtroccārānte sevito dṛṣṭergurutvamapanayati kavalāñjanānte sevito dṛṣṭiṃ prasādayati bhuktavatā sevitaḥ srotasāṃ viśuddhiṃ laghutāṃ cāpādayati vāntenāsevitaḥ srotovilagnaṃ śleṣmāṇamapohya bhaktākāṅkṣāmāpādayati divāsvapnotthitenāsevito nidrāśeṣaṃ gurutvaṃ malaṃ cāpohya cittaikāgryaṃ janayati sāyaṃ cāsevitaḥ sukhanidrāprabodhaṃ ceti
rūḍhe 'py ajīrṇavyāyāmavyavāyādīn vivarjayet
vimiśrā vihagāḥ puṃbhir ātmavyūhābhinanditāḥ
garuḍavyūham āsthāya sarvato haribhir vṛtaḥ
rākṣasendrabalaṃ dūrād apaśyad vyūham āsthitam

sarvagrahaṇenaiva dravādravāmle prāpte punardravādravavacanaṃ sarvaśabdasya dravādravāmlakārtsnyārthatāpratiṣedhārthaṃ bhavati hi prakaraṇād ekadeśe 'pi sarvavyapadeśaḥ yathā sarvān bhojayediti kiṃvā sarvagrahaṇam amlavipākānāṃ vrīhyādīnāṃ grahaṇārtham

etena yathā rasānām avāntaravyaktibhede 'pi madhuratvādisāmānyayogān madhurādivyapadeśena ṣaṭtvamucyate tathā madhurāmlamadhuralavaṇādisaṃsargāṇām api satyapyavāntarabhede sāmānyopasaṃgrahaṃ kṛtvā triṣaṣṭitvasaṃkhyāniyamo bhaviṣyatīti nirasyate yato madhurāmlādisaṃsarge 'pi vijātīyo madhurataramadhuratamādibhedakṛto bhedo 'parisaṃkhyeyo bhavati
yadā tu rasadvārā kāryaṃ dravyasya cintyate tadā rasaprabhāva iti vyapadeśo bhavati
kasyādya vyasanaṃ ghoraṃ kariṣyāmastavājñayā
vyasaneṣu manuṣyāṇāṃ bhṛśaṃ bhavati duḥkhitaḥ
kāmakrodhasamutthāni tyajethā vyasanāni ca
tanvyā yat suratāntatāntanayanaṃ vaktraṃ rativyatyaye tattvāṃ pātu cirāya kiṃ hariharabrahmādibhirdaivataiḥ
vṛddhānyonyavyatyayābhyāṃ ṣaṭ trivṛddhyā tu saptamaḥ
dvivṛddhyaikakṣayād uktavyatyayācca punaśca ṣaṭ
yathoktena vidhānena parihārakrameṇa ca
niṣkāmaṃ nāma kiṃcid anabhikāṅkṣya yathāvihitānuṣṭhānam iti
kecin na kiṃcid dhyānam iti yathoktānuṣṭhānaṃ yogam iti jñātvā muktim icchanti

dārān saṃgṛhya gṛhastho 'pi snānādiniyamācāro nityam aupāsanaṃ kṛtvā pākayajñayājī vaiśvadevahomānte gṛhāgataṃ guruṃ snātakaṃ ca pratyutthāyābhivandyāsanapādyācamanāni pradāya ghṛtadadhikṣīramiśraṃ madhuparkaṃ ca dattvānnādyair yathāśakti bhojayati
āture bāle pacanālaye ca śaucaṃ na vicāraṇīyaṃ yathāśakti syāt

brāhmaṇān pādau prakṣālya navāni vastrottarīyābharaṇāni dattvā puṣpādyaiḥ pūjayitvā dvādaśamūrtiṃ dhyāyann upadaṃśaghṛtaguḍadadhiphalayuktaṃ śvetam annaṃ bhojayitvā yathāśakti suvarṇaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ dadāti
yathārtham keśa yatnān kurvanti
śaṃ no mitra iti pāṇī prakṣālya yathārtham
saubhāgyamasyai dattvā yathārthaṃ viparetana
paśyato mama durbuddhir yiyāsur yamasādanam
yiyāsuḥ khāṇḍavaprastham āmantrayata keśavaḥ
bhīṣmaṃ yiyāsur yudhi saṃdadarśa duryodhanaṃ saindhavādīṃśca rājñaḥ
iha kumbhasya tale chidram aṅgulipraveśayogyaṃ kṛtvā tatra davarakaṃ kṣiptvā madhye bahirapi ca davarake granthiṃ dattvā tathā kāryaṃ yathā satkumbho galadghaṭī bhavati
jñāte'līkanimīlane nayanayordhūrtasya romāñcato lajjāsīn mama tena sāpyapahṛtā tatkālayogyaiḥ kramaiḥ
ete rasāyane yogyā brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
sṛmarādityādi atra kimayaṃ vācaḥ ityevamādibhiḥ atra klaibyamiti akālajā sṛmarādityādi kimayaṃ ityevamādibhiḥ klaibyamiti akālajā saumyaḥ kecit sṛmaro punaḥ kair ṣaṇḍhatetyarthaḥ
yasya yantā gataḥ ṣaṇḍho manye 'haṃ na sa jīvati
samaṃ putreṇa me ṣaṇḍhaṃ brahmabandho praśaṃsasi
ṣaḍvargavin mahābuddhir nītidharmavid uttamaḥ
sahāyāḥ kāraṇaṃ caiva ṣaḍvargo nītijaḥ smṛtaḥ
ṣaḍvargaṃ pratigṛhṇan sa dharmāt phalam upāśnute
